reviews.review_description: Really good game go and get it game came out yesterday so go get the game to be a OG really nice staff and really nice owners and game being active more

So recently I got the game. I jumped down from tutorial waiting to join a freaking public lobby. I waited so long but I went to City to buy cosmetics and they didn't work. So what happened though to this game?

developer_response.body: We are aware of this situation, we just need to shutdown for a bit and we will be back in a second!

reviews.review_description:
This is actually the best game. I thought it would be like a normal really game, but it’s way better than when I thought.
￼

reviews.review_title: I am going to try today
reviews.review_description: Thought that something is wrong with the play and I change my name and still didn’t work so I’m gonna go reach your join ok I’ll tell you if it doesn’t work

developer_response.body: Game is shutdown for now but it will be back.
